hero.headline:
Your Dream Backyard, Built by
Master Craftsmen
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should inspire you every time you step outside. Artisan Outdoor designs and builds extraordinary pools, kitchens, and living spaces across Southern California — so you get a backyard that feels like a private resort.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Outdoor Living Spaces That<br class="hidden md:block"> Transform How You Live
services.subtitle: From stunning pools to complete backyard retreats, our in-house design-build team handles every detail so you enjoy a seamless experience from first sketch to final walkthrough.

cards.title: Custom Pools & Spas
cards.description: Stunning pool and spa designs tailored to your lifestyle — from resort-style infinity edges to intimate plunge pools, built by our in-house craftsmen.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & BBQs
cards.description: Premium outdoor kitchens with built-in grills, countertops, and bar seating. Designed for serious entertaining under the Southern California sun.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water walls that create a captivating atmosphere and become the centerpiece of your outdoor space.

cards.title: Patios & Patio Covers
cards.description: Beautifully designed patios with custom cover structures that extend your living space and provide comfortable shade for year-round enjoyment.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Hardscape
cards.description: Complete landscape architecture including premium plantings, pavers, retaining walls, and decorative stonework — all installed by our crew.

cards.title: Turf, Lighting & Irrigation
cards.description: Low-maintenance synthetic turf, putting greens, sport courts, professional landscape lighting, and water-efficient irrigation systems.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Reality in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Schedule a free design consultation. We visit your property, listen to your ideas, and discuss possibilities. You'll receive a custom design concept that captures your dream outdoor space.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our in-house team of craftsmen handles everything — design, permits, and construction. One crew, one point of contact, and complete transparency from start to finish.

steps.title: Live the Outdoor Life
steps.description: Step into your new backyard oasis. Every detail is crafted to perfection, backed by our commitment to quality. Your outdoor living dream is now your daily reality.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Artisan
about.headline: Not Just Contractors — We're Outdoor Living Artisans
about.description: Founded by Jim Neeld, Artisan Outdoor is a design-build firm with an in-house crew of craftsmen who take your project from initial concept through final construction. Featured on HGTV and honored with CLCA Beautification Awards and Best of Houzz recognition, we bring visionary craftsmanship and meticulous attention to detail to every backyard across Orange County and Southern California.

features.title: In-House Design-Build Team
features.description: No subcontractors, no miscommunication. Our craftsmen handle every phase of your project for a seamless, stress-free experience.

features.title: Award-Winning Craftsmanship
features.description: CLCA Beautification Awards, Best of Houzz honors, and HGTV recognition — our work speaks for itself in every detail.

features.title: Complete Transparency & Collaboration
features.description: You're involved at every step. We believe the best outdoor spaces are born from genuine collaboration between designer and homeowner.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom — request a free consultation to get an honest quote tailored to your vision and property. Financing available through Lyon Financial.

guarantee.headline: Our "Artisan Perfection" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We don't consider a project complete until every detail meets our exacting standards — and yours. If anything falls short of the vision we agreed upon together, we make it right at no additional cost. That's the Artisan promise.

faqs.question: How does the design-build process work?
faqs.answer: It starts with a free consultation where we visit your property and discuss your vision. From there, we create a custom design, handle all permits, and build everything with our in-house crew. One team from start to finish — no juggling subcontractors.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A simple patio project might take 2-4 weeks, while a full backyard transformation with pool, kitchen, and landscaping typically runs 8-16 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during the design phase so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes! We partner with Lyon Financial to offer flexible financing options so you can build your dream backyard without waiting. Ask about available plans during your free consultation.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve 35+ cities across Orange County and Southern California, including Irvine, Newport Beach, Huntington Beach, Laguna Beach, Anaheim, Fullerton, Costa Mesa, and many more. Contact us to confirm service in your area.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Artisan Outdoor holds Contractor License #623523 with C27, C53, and B classifications. We carry full liability insurance and workers' compensation. Your property and our team are fully protected on every project.

testimonials.name: Jason P.
testimonials.text: Simply the best landscape/hardscape contractor I have seen. It was the most seamless process and great results. They do design and build and can make just about anything you can imagine.

testimonials.name: Holly O.
testimonials.text: They did a phenomenal job renovating my patio. I was impressed with their professionalism and dedication in delivering a first class result.

testimonials.name: Hector R.
testimonials.text: An exceptional company with expert employees who are dedicated to making your wish list come true. Highly recommend for anyone looking to transform their outdoor space.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation with our team. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and show you what's possible — no pressure, no obligation.

footer.description: Award-winning design-build firm. Crafting luxury outdoor living spaces across Southern California since 2015.
